languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, прибыло сообщение от магоса Тау-Фи-0098. Он сообщает, что исследования дали результат, и наконец-то появился шанс обезопасить Зарков".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, прибыло сообщение от магоса Тау-Фи-0098. Он сообщает, что исследования дали результат, и наконец-то появился шанс обезопасить Зарков".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, прибыло сообщение от магоса Тау-Фи-0098. Он сообщает, что исследования дали результат, и наконец-то появился шанс обезопасить Зарков".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that the research has yielded results, and that at last there is a chance to render Zarkov safe."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

"Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that the research has yielded results, and that at last there is a chance to render Zarkov safe."
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

languages.text: 「大佐、マゴス・タウ・フィ・0098から電報が届きました。彼の研究で成果が得られ、ついにオムニシアスの所有物を確保するチャンスが訪れたと報告しています。おそらくザルコフのコロニーのことでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has produced some results, and there is finally a chance to secure the possessions of the Omnissiah. I believe he is referring to the colony on Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「大佐、マゴス・タウ・フィ・0098から電報が届きました。彼の研究で成果が得られ、ついにオムニシアスの所有物を確保するチャンスが訪れたと報告しています。おそらくザルコフのコロニーのことでしょう。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha llegado un mensaje del magos Tau-Fi-0098. Informa de que su investigación ha dado resultados y asegura que hay una posibilidad de hacer que Zarkov sea un lugar seguro».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha llegado un mensaje del magos Tau-Fi-0098. Informa de que su investigación ha dado resultados y asegura que hay una posibilidad de hacer que Zarkov sea un lugar seguro».

languages.text: “大人，收到贤者陶-斐-0098的讯息。他汇报称研究已取得成果，终于有机会确保扎尔科夫的安全了。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

traits.locale_text: “大人，收到贤者陶-斐-0098的讯息。他汇报称研究已取得成果，终于有机会确保扎尔科夫的安全了。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, eine Nachricht von Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist eingetroffen. Er meldet, dass seine Forschung erste Ergebnisse liefert und dass es eine letzte Chance gibt, für Zarkovs Sicherheit zu sorgen.
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, eine Nachricht von Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist eingetroffen. Er meldet, dass seine Forschung erste Ergebnisse liefert und dass es eine letzte Chance gibt, für Zarkovs Sicherheit zu sorgen.

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Tau-Fi-0098'den mesaj geldi. Araştırmasının sonuç verdiğini ve Zarkov'u güvenli hâle getirmek için nihayet bir şans olduğunu bildiriyor."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Magos Tau-Fi-0098'den mesaj geldi. Araştırmasının sonuç verdiğini ve Zarkov'u güvenli hâle getirmek için nihayet bir şans olduğunu bildiriyor."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu un message du magos Tau-Phi-0098. Il rapporte que ses recherches ont porté leurs fruits et que nous avons enfin une chance d'assurer à Zarkov un avenir apaisé. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a message has arrived from Magos Tau-Phi-0098. He reports that his research has yielded results and that there is at last a chance to render Zarkov safe."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons reçu un message du magos Tau-Phi-0098. Il rapporte que ses recherches ont porté leurs fruits et que nous avons enfin une chance d'assurer à Zarkov un avenir apaisé. »
